heading: Senate and House Manuals
label: 720 Senate and House Manuals
text: Each House may order printed as many copies as it desires, of the Senate Manual and of the Rules and Manual of the House of Representatives, even though the cost exceed $500.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 148 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 617
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 148 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 617
